items.title: Many Paths to Recovery: The Case for Treatment Pluralism.
items.summary: A synopsis argues that decades of research have not identified a consistently superior treatment for musculoskeletal pain, with various interventions showing modest, broadly equivalent effects likely mediated by overlapping, nonspecific, and contextual mechanisms.
items.curatedReason: 这篇综述指出，大量研究未能找到针对肌肉骨骼疼痛的“优越”单一疗法，强调了治疗的多元性。你应该接受运动疗法和手法技术的效果可能由非特异性机制介导的事实，更注重结合患者偏好和生物-心理-社会模型来个性化治疗方案，而非执着于单一“最佳”干预。
items.titleZh: 殊途同归：治疗多元性的案例
items.summaryZh: 一篇综述认为，数十年的研究未能为肌肉骨骼疼痛找到持续优越的治疗方法，各种干预措施显示出适度且大致相当的效果，这可能由重叠的、非特异性和情境性机制介导。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review indicates that extensive research has failed to identify a 'superior' single therapy for musculoskeletal pain, emphasizing treatment pluralism. You should embrace the fact that the effects of exercise therapy and manual techniques may be mediated by nonspecific mechanisms, focusing more on personalizing treatment plans by integrating patient preferences and the biopsychosocial model, rather than clinging to a single 'best' intervention.
items.journal: The Journal of orthopaedic and sports physical therapy

items.title: Is Knee Osteoarthritis an Inevitable Consequence for Athletes after Anterior Cruciate Ligament Injury?
items.summary: A review emphasizes that anterior cruciate ligament (ACL) injury should be viewed as a long-term knee joint health condition potentially leading to post-traumatic knee osteoarthritis, despite surgical advances.
items.curatedReason: 这篇综述提醒你，前交叉韧带（ACL）损伤并非仅仅是短期运动创伤，更是导致创伤后膝骨关节炎的长期风险因素。在制定康复方案时，你需要将预防骨关节炎纳入长期目标，并与患者充分沟通这一风险。
items.titleZh: 前交叉韧带损伤后，膝骨关节炎对运动员而言是否不可避免？
items.summaryZh: 一篇综述强调，前交叉韧带（ACL）损伤应被视为可能导致创伤后膝骨关节炎的长期膝关节健康问题，尽管手术技术有所进步。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review reminds you that anterior cruciate ligament (ACL) injury is not merely a short-term sports trauma but a long-term risk factor for post-traumatic knee osteoarthritis. When developing rehabilitation plans, you need to integrate osteoarthritis prevention into long-term goals and thoroughly communicate this risk to patients.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Association between Patellofemoral Conditions and the Incidence of ACL Injury: Could Patellofemoral Conditions be a Risk Factor for ACL Injury? A 10-year Population-Based Study.
items.summary: A 10-year population-based study investigated the association between patellofemoral conditions and the incidence of ACL injury, suggesting that prior patellofemoral diagnoses might be a risk factor.
items.curatedReason: 这项长达10年的人口学研究表明，髌股关节疾病与前交叉韧带（ACL）损伤风险增加相关。在评估和训练年轻活跃患者时，尤其是那些有髌股疼痛史的，你需要更警惕ACL损伤风险，并考虑针对髌股关节生物力学缺陷进行早期干预。
items.titleZh: 髌股关节疾病与ACL损伤发生率的关联：髌股关节疾病会是ACL损伤的风险因素吗？一项10年基于人群的研究
items.summaryZh: 一项为期10年的基于人群的研究调查了髌股关节疾病与前交叉韧带（ACL）损伤发生率之间的关联，提示既往髌股关节诊断可能是ACL损伤的一个风险因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This 10-year population-based study indicates an association between patellofemoral conditions and increased risk of anterior cruciate ligament (ACL) injury. When evaluating and training young, active patients, especially those with a history of patellofemoral pain, you need to be more vigilant about ACL injury risk and consider early intervention for patellofemoral biomechanical deficits.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Phenomenological exploration of perceptions, experiences, facilitators, and inhibitors in patients with knee osteoarthritis during physiotherapy rehabilitation in a low- and middle-income country.
items.summary: A qualitative study explored perceptions, experiences, facilitators, and inhibitors of physiotherapy rehabilitation in knee osteoarthritis patients in a low- and middle-income country, highlighting the influence of lifestyle and contextual factors.
items.curatedReason: 本研究定性探讨了低收入国家膝骨关节炎患者接受物理治疗康复时的感知、体验、促进因素和障碍。这些发现提示你，文化和经济背景对患者依从性和治疗效果有显著影响，需要调整干预策略，超越生物力学因素。
items.titleZh: 低收入国家膝骨关节炎患者物理治疗康复期间感知、体验、促进因素和障碍的现象学探索
items.summaryZh: 一项定性研究探讨了低收入国家膝骨关节炎患者在接受物理治疗康复时的感知、体验、促进因素和障碍，强调了生活方式和情境因素的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study explores the perceptions, experiences, facilitators, and inhibitors of physiotherapy rehabilitation in knee osteoarthritis patients in a low-income country. These findings suggest that cultural and socioeconomic contexts significantly impact patient adherence and treatment outcomes, requiring you to adapt intervention strategies beyond biomechanical factors.

related.title: Phenomenological exploration of perceptions, experiences, facilitators, and inhibitors in patients with knee osteoarthritis during physiotherapy rehabilitation in a low- and middle-income country | BMC Musculoskeletal Disorders | Springer Nature Link

items.title: Exploring psychological flexibility processes in adults with spinal cord injury: a qualitative study.
items.summary: A qualitative study explored psychological flexibility processes in adults with spinal cord injury, revealing how this capacity to remain open to difficult experiences while engaging in values-based action impacts mental health.
items.curatedReason: 这项定性研究深入探讨了脊髓损伤患者心理灵活性在日常生活中的表现。这些见解能帮助你更有效地将基于接受与承诺疗法（ACT）的策略整合到神经康复中，以改善患者的心理健康和价值观导向行为。
items.titleZh: 探索脊髓损伤成年人的心理灵活性过程：一项定性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项定性研究探讨了脊髓损伤成年人的心理灵活性过程，揭示了这种在面对困难内部体验时仍能进行基于价值观行动的能力如何影响心理健康。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study delves into how psychological flexibility manifests in the daily lives of individuals with spinal cord injury. These insights can help you more effectively integrate Acceptance and Commitment Therapy (ACT)-based strategies into neurorehabilitation to improve patients' mental health and value-driven actions.

items.title: Developing consensus on competency-based educational standards in orthopaedic manual physical therapy fellowship training: part 2: knowledge for specialty practice and professionalism.
items.summary: The second part of a study developing consensus on competency-based educational standards in Orthopaedic Manual Physical Therapy (OMPT) fellowship training focuses on the knowledge required for specialty practice and professionalism.
items.curatedReason: 这是骨科手法物理治疗（OMPT）专科培训能力标准共识系列研究的第二部分。它为OMPT专科实践所需的知识和专业精神建立了更明确的框架，这能帮助你在评估自身或团队的OMPT能力时有更清晰的参照，并为学术机构提供课程设计依据。
items.titleZh: 骨科手法物理治疗进修培训中基于能力教育标准共识的制定：第二部分：专科实践知识和专业精神
items.summaryZh: 一项旨在制定骨科手法物理治疗（OMPT）进修培训中基于能力教育标准的共识研究的第二部分，聚焦于专科实践所需的知识和专业精神。
items.curatedReasonEn: This is the second part of a consensus study on competency-based educational standards for Orthopaedic Manual Physical Therapy (OMPT) fellowship training. It establishes a clearer framework for the knowledge and professionalism required in OMPT specialty practice, which can help you in evaluating your own or your team's OMPT competencies and provide a basis for curriculum design in academic institutions.
items.journal: The Journal of manual & manipulative therapy

items.title: Effect of Femoral Nerve Neurodynamic Techniques on Pain in Patellofemoral Pain Syndrome: A Randomised Controlled Trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial (N=71) found that adding femoral nerve neurodynamic techniques to routine physiotherapy significantly improved knee pain and function in patients with patellofemoral pain syndrome.
items.curatedReason: 这项RCT研究显示，股神经神经动力学技术对髌股疼痛综合征的疼痛和功能有额外益处。如果你在常规康复中遇到治疗效果不佳的髌股疼痛患者，可以考虑将股神经松动术作为辅助干预手段。
items.titleZh: 股神经神经动力学技术对髌股疼痛综合征疼痛的影响：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验（N=71）发现，在常规物理治疗中加入股神经神经动力学技术，能显著改善髌股疼痛综合征患者的膝关节疼痛和功能。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT indicates that femoral nerve neurodynamic techniques provide additional benefits for pain and function in patellofemoral pain syndrome. If you encounter patellofemoral pain patients with suboptimal responses to conventional rehabilitation, consider femoral nerve mobilization as an adjunctive intervention.

items.title: Early Neuromuscular and Co-activation Patterns After Anterior Cruciate Ligament Reconstruction In Males: A Case-control Exploratory Feasibility Study.
items.summary: An exploratory feasibility case-control study quantified early (within ~2 weeks) neuromuscular and co-activation patterns in males after anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction (ACLR), highlighting arthrogenic muscle inhibition (AMI) as a significant barrier to muscle recovery.
items.curatedReason: 这项探索性可行性研究量化了ACL重建术后早期（术后2周内）神经肌肉和共激活模式。它提醒你，术后早期的关节源性肌肉抑制（AMI）和襻绳肌过度共激活可能远超预期，在康复早期你需要更积极地处理股四头肌抑制和异常运动模式，以优化长期恢复。
items.titleZh: 男性前交叉韧带重建术后早期神经肌肉和共激活模式：一项病例对照探索性可行性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项探索性可行性病例对照研究量化了男性前交叉韧带（ACL）重建术后早期（约2周内）的神经肌肉和共激活模式，强调关节源性肌肉抑制（AMI）是肌肉恢复的重要障碍。
items.curatedReasonEn: This exploratory feasibility study quantifies early neuromuscular and co-activation patterns after ACL reconstruction (within 2 weeks post-op). It reminds you that early post-operative arthrogenic muscle inhibition (AMI) and excessive hamstring co-activation may be greater than expected. You need to more actively address quadriceps inhibition and abnormal movement patterns in early rehabilitation to optimize long-term recovery.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Core Stability Training for Post-Stroke Recovery: A Multifaceted Approach to Enhance Postural Control and Motor Function.
items.summary: A review explored the multifaceted mechanisms of Core Stability Training (CST) as a promising intervention for stroke survivors to address deficits in postural control and motor function, significantly impacting independence and quality of life.
items.curatedReason: 这篇综述探讨了核心稳定性训练在卒中康复中改善姿势控制和运动功能的机制。它强化了核心训练作为中风患者全面康复方案一部分的重要性，指导你在制定康复计划时，要将核心力量和控制纳入重点。
items.titleZh: 卒中康复中的核心稳定性训练：增强姿势控制和运动功能的多方面方法
items.summaryZh: 一篇综述探讨了核心稳定性训练（CST）作为中风幸存者一项有前景的干预措施，在解决姿势控制和运动功能缺陷方面的多方面机制，这些缺陷显著影响独立性和生活质量。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review explores the mechanisms by which core stability training improves postural control and motor function in stroke rehabilitation. It reinforces the importance of core training as part of a comprehensive rehabilitation program for stroke patients, guiding you to prioritize core strength and control when developing rehabilitation plans.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Effect of home-based rehabilitation in frail older adults after cardiac surgery: a prospective feasibility study.
items.summary: A prospective feasibility study evaluated the Vivifrail multicomponent exercise program for home-based rehabilitation in frail older adults after cardiac surgery, finding it feasible for postoperative implementation.
items.curatedReason: 这项可行性研究表明，对接受心脏手术的虚弱老年人进行居家康复是可行的。这为你将居家运动方案 Vivifrail 整合到高危老年患者术后康复中提供了依据，尤其是在优化患者依从性和减轻医疗系统负担方面。
items.titleZh: 心脏手术后虚弱老年人居家康复的效果：一项前瞻性可行性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项前瞻性可行性研究评估了Vivifrail多组分运动方案在心脏手术后虚弱老年人居家康复中的应用，发现其在术后实施是可行的。
items.curatedReasonEn: This feasibility study indicates that home-based rehabilitation for frail older adults after cardiac surgery is viable. This provides a basis for you to integrate the home exercise program Vivifrail into postoperative rehabilitation for high-risk older patients, especially in optimizing patient adherence and reducing the burden on the healthcare system.

items.title: Influence of environmental barriers and facilitators on functioning: Analytical observational study in community-dwelling older adults.
items.summary: An analytical observational study analyzed the influence of environmental barriers and facilitators on the functioning of community-dwelling older adults, using standardized quantitative and multidimensional evaluation instruments.
items.curatedReason: 这项观察性研究量化了环境障碍和促进因素对社区老年人功能的影响。它提醒你，在评估和干预老年患者时，不能只关注个体功能缺陷，更要系统性地考虑家庭和社区环境，并积极倡导环境改造以支持老年人独立生活。
items.titleZh: 环境障碍和促进因素对功能的影响：一项社区老年人的分析性观察研究
items.summaryZh: 一项分析性观察研究利用标准化定量和多维度评估工具，分析了环境障碍和促进因素对社区老年人功能的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This observational study quantifies the impact of environmental barriers and facilitators on the functioning of community-dwelling older adults. It reminds you that when assessing and intervening with older patients, you must not only focus on individual functional deficits but also systematically consider the home and community environment, and actively advocate for environmental modifications to support independent living for older adults.

items.title: From robustness to frailty: how post-COVID-19 frailty shapes dyspnea, fatigue, and physical and functional status in post-COVID-19 syndrome.
items.summary: A cross-sectional study (N=45) examined the relationship between post-COVID-19 frailty and dyspnea, fatigue, and physical and functional status in individuals with post-COVID-19 syndrome, comparing outcomes by frailty level.
items.curatedReason: 这项横断面研究揭示了COVID-19后遗症（PCS）患者的衰弱程度与呼吸困难、疲劳及体能、功能状态之间的关系。在评估和管理PCS患者时，你需要重视衰弱状态对康复预后的显著影响，并将其作为制定综合康复计划的关键考量。
items.titleZh: 从强健到衰弱：COVID-19后衰弱如何塑造COVID-19后遗症中的呼吸困难、疲劳以及体能和功能状态
items.summaryZh: 一项横断面研究（N=45）调查了COVID-19后衰弱与后遗症患者呼吸困难、疲劳、身体和功能状态之间的关系，并根据衰弱水平比较了这些结果。
items.curatedReasonEn: This cross-sectional study reveals the relationship between frailty levels and dyspnea, fatigue, and physical and functional status in patients with post-COVID-19 syndrome (PCS). When assessing and managing PCS patients, you need to pay attention to the significant impact of frailty on rehabilitation outcomes and consider it a key factor in developing comprehensive rehabilitation plans.

items.title: Effect of a multimodal exercise training program on sleep in older adults: a randomized controlled trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial (N.A. for sample size) investigated the effect of a multimodal exercise training program on sleep in older adults, aiming to improve functional capabilities by combining various exercise modalities.
items.curatedReason: 这项随机对照试验表明，多模式运动训练计划能改善老年人的睡眠质量。这意味着你在制定老年患者康复计划时，除了关注功能和力量，也应将睡眠质量作为一个重要目标，并考虑结合多种运动形式。
items.titleZh: 多模式运动训练计划对老年人睡眠影响的随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验（未给出样本量）研究了多模式运动训练计划对老年人睡眠的影响，旨在通过结合多种运动方式来改善功能能力。
items.curatedReasonEn: This randomized controlled trial shows that a multimodal exercise training program can improve sleep quality in older adults. This means that when designing rehabilitation plans for older patients, you should consider sleep quality as an important goal, in addition to function and strength, and consider combining various forms of exercise.

items.title: Thoracic Manipulation versus Myofascial Release on Pain, Function, and Proprioception in Patients with Shoulder Impingement Syndrome: A Randomized Controlled Trial. - ScienceDirect
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial investigated the effects of thoracic manipulation versus myofascial release on pain, function, and proprioception in patients with shoulder impingement syndrome.
items.curatedReason: 这项随机对照试验比较了胸椎手法和筋膜放松对肩峰撞击综合征疼痛、功能和本体感觉的影响。如果你在临床中处理这类患者，这篇研究为你选择手法干预提供了证据参考，表明胸椎手法可能是更有效的选择。
items.titleZh: 胸椎手法与筋膜放松对肩峰撞击综合征患者疼痛、功能和本体感觉的影响：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验研究了胸椎手法与筋膜放松对肩峰撞击综合征患者疼痛、功能和本体感觉的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This randomized controlled trial compares the effects of thoracic manipulation and myofascial release on pain, function, and proprioception in shoulder impingement syndrome. If you treat such patients in clinical practice, this study provides evidence for choosing manual interventions, suggesting that thoracic manipulation might be a more effective option.

items.title: Capsular management in posterolateral total hip arthroplasty: impact on proprioception, balance, functional outcomes, and complications | Journal of Orthopaedic Surgery and Research | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: A study explored the impact of capsular management in posterolateral total hip arthroplasty on proprioception, balance, functional outcomes, and complications.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究分析了后外侧全髋关节置换术中囊膜管理对本体感觉、平衡和功能预后的影响。它提醒你，在髋关节术后康复中，应关注囊膜修复对手术稳定性和本体感觉恢复的关键作用，并将这些因素整合到你的康复评估和训练方案中。
items.titleZh: 后外侧全髋关节置换术中的囊膜管理：对本体感觉、平衡、功能预后和并发症的影响
items.summaryZh: 一项研究探讨了后外侧全髋关节置换术中囊膜管理对本体感觉、平衡、功能预后和并发症的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study analyzes the impact of capsular management in posterolateral total hip arthroplasty on proprioception, balance, and functional outcomes. It reminds you that in hip arthroplasty rehabilitation, you should focus on the critical role of capsular repair in surgical stability and proprioception recovery, integrating these factors into your rehabilitation assessment and training programs.

items.title: Transparency does not equal evidence: a multidimensional quality and guideline concordance analysis of YouTube videos on low back pain self-management | Journal of Public Health | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: A multidimensional quality and guideline concordance analysis found that YouTube videos on low back pain self-management often have high transparency but low adherence to clinical guidelines.
items.curatedReason: 这项分析显示，YouTube上关于腰痛自我管理的视频透明度高，但与临床指南的一致性差。它提醒你，患者从在线资源获取的信息可能存在偏差，你需要主动教育患者，帮助他们辨别基于证据的可靠信息，并纠正不准确的观念。
items.titleZh: 透明度不等于证据：YouTube腰痛自我管理视频的多维度质量和指南一致性分析
items.summaryZh: 一项多维度质量和指南一致性分析发现，YouTube上关于腰痛自我管理的视频通常透明度高，但与临床指南的符合度较低。
items.curatedReasonEn: This analysis shows that YouTube videos on low back pain self-management have high transparency but poor concordance with clinical guidelines. It reminds you that information patients obtain from online resources may be biased, and you need to proactively educate patients, helping them identify reliable, evidence-based information and correct inaccurate perceptions.

items.title: Rehabilitation Utilizing Blood Flow Restriction Following Surgical Repair of a Bankart Lesion with a Buford Complex in an Elite High School Football Player: A Case Report.
items.summary: A case report details the rehabilitation of an elite high school football player following Bankart lesion repair with a Buford complex, utilizing blood flow restriction (BFR) training, an area with limited existing evidence.
items.curatedReason: 这份病例报告描述了精英高中橄榄球运动员Bankart合并Buford复合体修复术后使用血流限制训练的康复。虽然是单病例，但它为你在处理这类复杂肩关节损伤患者，尤其是在重返高强度运动方面，提供了血流限制训练的初步思路。
items.titleZh: 精英高中橄榄球运动员Bankart合并Buford复合体修复术后采用血流限制康复的病例报告
items.summaryZh: 一份病例报告详细介绍了精英高中橄榄球运动员在Bankart病变合并Buford复合体修复术后采用血流限制（BFR）训练的康复过程，该领域现有证据有限。
items.curatedReasonEn: This case report describes rehabilitation using blood flow restriction training after Bankart lesion repair with a Buford complex in an elite high school football player. Although a single case, it offers initial insights into applying blood flow restriction training for such complex shoulder injuries, especially concerning return to high-intensity sports.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Moving Forward Together. Part 5: Championing Physical Therapy Allyship and Advocacy for Indigenous Peoples With Musculoskeletal Pain.
items.summary: The fifth article in the 'Moving Forward Together' series explores the critical role of allyship and advocacy for physical therapists in improving the musculoskeletal health of Indigenous Peoples, aligning with calls for truth-telling and healing from colonization impacts.
items.curatedReason: 这篇特邀文章强调了物理治疗师在改善原住民肌肉骨骼健康方面的盟友和倡导者角色。虽然主要针对美国市场，但它提醒你，在任何多文化执业环境中，理解并尊重不同族群的健康观念和历史创伤，是提供文化敏感性护理的关键。
items.titleZh: 共同前进。第五部分：倡导物理治疗师对患有肌肉骨骼疼痛的原住民的盟友关系和权益维护
items.summaryZh: “共同前进”系列文章的第五部分探讨了物理治疗师在改善原住民肌肉骨骼健康方面的盟友和倡导作用，呼应了对殖民化影响进行真相揭示和疗愈的呼吁。
items.curatedReasonEn: This invited article highlights the role of physical therapists as allies and advocates in improving the musculoskeletal health of Indigenous Peoples. While primarily aimed at the US market, it reminds you that in any multicultural practice environment, understanding and respecting different ethnic groups' health beliefs and historical traumas is crucial for providing culturally sensitive care.
items.journal: The Journal of orthopaedic and sports physical therapy

items.title: National survey of stroke rehabilitation services in Indonesia.
items.summary: A cross-sectional online survey (N.A. for sample size) described sub-acute stroke rehabilitation services in Indonesia, exploring characteristics such as staffing, session frequency, duration, and insurance coverage.
items.curatedReason: 这项针对印度尼西亚卒中康复服务的全国调查揭示了当地服务的特点。作为国际从业者，这能帮助你了解不同地区康复资源的差异，为跨文化合作或评估国际文献在本土应用的适用性提供背景信息。
items.titleZh: 印度尼西亚卒中康复服务全国调查
items.summaryZh: 一项横断面在线调查（未给出样本量）描述了印度尼西亚的亚急性卒中康复服务，探讨了人员配置、治疗频率、持续时间及保险覆盖等特征。
items.curatedReasonEn: This national survey of stroke rehabilitation services in Indonesia reveals the characteristics of local services. As an international practitioner, this can help you understand the differences in rehabilitation resources across regions, providing background information for cross-cultural collaboration or assessing the applicability of international literature to local contexts.

items.title: Evolving Demographics and Injury Characteristics of US Traumatic Spinal Cord Injury, 1972-2024.
items.summary: A cross-sectional analysis of the Spinal Cord Injury Model Systems (SCIMS) database (N=37,866) examined evolving demographics and injury characteristics of new traumatic spinal cord injury (tSCI) cases in the US from 1972 to 2024.
items.curatedReason: 这项针对美国创伤性脊髓损伤（tSCI）患者的长期分析揭示了1972-2024年间人口统计学和损伤特征的变化。这些趋势信息能帮助你更好地理解tSCI患者群体的演变，从而优化康复服务的规划和资源分配。
items.titleZh: 1972-2024年美国创伤性脊髓损伤患者人口统计学和损伤特征的演变
items.summaryZh: 一项对脊髓损伤模型系统（SCIMS）数据库（N=37,866）的横断面分析，研究了1972年至2024年美国新增创伤性脊髓损伤（tSCI）病例的人口统计学和损伤特征的演变。
items.curatedReasonEn: This long-term analysis of traumatic spinal cord injury (tSCI) patients in the US reveals changes in demographic and injury characteristics from 1972-2024. This trend information can help you better understand the evolution of the tSCI patient population, thereby optimizing the planning and resource allocation of rehabilitation services.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

items.title: Make or break: psychotropic medications have off-label effects on neuromuscular performance
items.summary: A commentary discusses how psychotropic medications, used by athletes for mental health conditions like anxiety, depression, and ADHD, can have off-label effects on neuromuscular performance, impacting physical resilience and peak performances.
items.curatedReason: 这篇述评讨论了精神药物对神经肌肉表现的非标签效应。作为运动康复医生，你需要认识到运动员可能因精神健康问题服用药物，并评估这些药物如何影响其运动表现和康复进展，从而调整训练方案和沟通策略。
items.titleZh: 成败与否：精神药物对神经肌肉表现的非标签效应
items.summaryZh: 一篇评论讨论了精神药物（运动员用于治疗焦虑、抑郁和ADHD等精神健康问题）如何对神经肌肉表现产生非标签效应，从而影响身体恢复力和巅峰表现。
items.curatedReasonEn: This commentary discusses the off-label effects of psychotropic medications on neuromuscular performance. As a sports physical therapist, you need to recognize that athletes may be taking medication for mental health issues and assess how these drugs affect their athletic performance and rehabilitation progress, thereby adjusting training plans and communication strategies.

items.title: Delayed body literacy in elite female athletes: a lived experience at age 30
items.summary: An article by a four-time Olympian and 10-time Olympic medallist discusses the delayed body literacy she experienced as an elite female athlete, only truly understanding her body's workings near age 30, despite it being her career vehicle.
items.curatedReason: 这篇来自奥运奖牌得主的文章强调了精英女运动员对自身身体认识的滞后性。它提醒你，在与女运动员（尤其是年轻运动员）合作时，应主动促进她们的身体素养，帮助她们理解生理周期、营养和训练之间的关系，以优化表现并预防损伤。
items.titleZh: 精英女运动员延迟的身体素养：30岁时的亲身经历
items.summaryZh: 一篇由四届奥运会选手和十届奥运奖牌得主撰写的文章，讲述了她作为一名精英女运动员所经历的身体素养滞后问题，尽管身体是她职业生涯的载体，但直到近30岁才真正了解自己的身体运作方式。
items.curatedReasonEn: This article from an Olympic medalist highlights the delayed body literacy among elite female athletes. It reminds you that when working with female athletes (especially younger ones), you should proactively promote their body literacy, helping them understand the relationship between their physiological cycle, nutrition, and training to optimize performance and prevent injuries.

items.title: Cryotherapy combined with standard rehabilitation and early functional recovery after knee arthroplasty: a retrospective cohort study | BMC Musculoskeletal Disorders | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: A retrospective cohort study investigated whether cryotherapy combined with standard rehabilitation influenced early functional recovery after knee arthroplasty.
items.curatedReason: 这项回顾性队列研究显示，冷疗结合标准康复能促进膝关节置换术后的早期功能恢复。在术后早期管理中，你可以将冷疗作为标准康复的有效辅助手段，以减轻疼痛和肿胀，从而加速患者功能恢复进程。
items.titleZh: 冷疗结合标准康复与膝关节置换术后早期功能恢复：一项回顾性队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项回顾性队列研究调查了冷疗结合标准康复是否影响膝关节置换术后的早期功能恢复。
items.curatedReasonEn: This retrospective cohort study shows that cryotherapy combined with standard rehabilitation promotes early functional recovery after knee arthroplasty. In early postoperative management, you can use cryotherapy as an effective adjunct to standard rehabilitation to reduce pain and swelling, thereby accelerating patients' functional recovery process.

items.title: Group-based versus one-to-one occupational therapy to improve ADL ability in people with chronic conditions: a pilot and feasibility RCT of the Go:OT study | Pilot and Feasibility Studies | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: A pilot and feasibility randomized controlled trial compared group-based versus one-to-one occupational therapy to improve ADL ability in people with chronic conditions.
items.curatedReason: 这项针对慢性病患者ADL能力改善的团队与一对一职业治疗的预可行性RCT表明，团队治疗可能与一对一治疗同样有效。这提示你，在资源受限或需要提升效率时，团队治疗可以作为一种可行的替代方案，但仍需大规模RCT进一步验证。
items.titleZh: 团队 vs. 一对一职业治疗改善慢性病患者ADL能力的Go:OT研究：一项预可行性随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项预可行性随机对照试验比较了团队治疗与一对一职业治疗在改善慢性病患者日常生活活动（ADL）能力方面的效果。
items.curatedReasonEn: This pilot and feasibility RCT on group-based versus one-to-one occupational therapy to improve ADL ability in people with chronic conditions suggests that group therapy may be as effective as one-to-one. This indicates that group therapy can be a viable alternative in resource-constrained settings or when efficiency needs to be improved, though larger RCTs are still needed for further validation.

items.title: Retraction Note: The effectiveness of routine physiotherapy with and without neuromobilization on pain and functional disability in patients with shoulder impingement syndrome; a randomized control clinical trial.
items.summary: A retraction notice was issued for a randomized controlled clinical trial that investigated the effectiveness of routine physiotherapy with and without neuromobilization on pain and functional disability in patients with shoulder impingement syndrome.
items.curatedReason: 这是一篇关于肩峰撞击综合征物理治疗研究的撤稿通知。这提醒你，即使是已发表的文献，也可能存在质量问题，在临床实践中采纳证据时务必保持批判性思维。
items.titleZh: 撤稿声明：常规物理治疗结合或不结合神经松动术对肩峰撞击综合征患者疼痛和功能障碍的有效性；一项随机对照临床试验
items.summaryZh: 一份撤稿声明发布，涉及一项关于常规物理治疗结合或不结合神经松动术对肩峰撞击综合征患者疼痛和功能障碍有效性的随机对照临床试验。
items.curatedReasonEn: This is a retraction notice for a physiotherapy study on shoulder impingement syndrome. It reminds you that even published literature can have quality issues, and it's crucial to maintain critical thinking when adopting evidence in clinical practice.

items.title: Australasian College of Sport and Exercise Physicians edition: uncertainty in sport and exercise medicine
items.summary: The Australasian College of Sport and Exercise Physicians (ACSEP) edition explores the central theme of uncertainty in sport and exercise medicine, aligning with their upcoming 2026 Annual Scientific Conference in Brisbane.
items.curatedReason: 这是澳大拉西亚运动与运动医师学院（ACSEP）年会的特刊，主题是运动医学中的不确定性。这提醒你，运动医学领域仍存在许多未解之谜，批判性思维和应对复杂病例的能力至关重要。
items.titleZh: 澳大拉西亚运动与运动医师学院特刊：运动与运动医学中的不确定性
items.summaryZh: 澳大拉西亚运动与运动医师学院（ACSEP）特刊探讨了运动与运动医学中的不确定性这一核心主题，与其即将在布里斯班举行的2026年年会相呼应。
items.curatedReasonEn: This is a special edition for the Australasian College of Sport and Exercise Physicians (ACSEP) annual scientific conference, focusing on uncertainty in sport and exercise medicine. It reminds you that many unknowns persist in sports medicine, and critical thinking and the ability to manage complex cases are crucial.

items.title: School-based Motor Skill Interventions for Children and Adolescents with Developmental Coordination Disorder: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis investigated the effects of school-based interventions on motor performance in children and adolescents with developmental coordination disorder (DCD), finding positive results.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和荟萃分析证实了学校运动技能干预对发育性协调障碍（DCD）儿童和青少年运动表现的积极影响。这意味着你应该积极支持和推广学校内的运动干预，它们是改善 DCD 患者功能的重要途径。
items.titleZh: 针对发育性协调障碍儿童和青少年的学校运动技能干预：一项系统综述与荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和荟萃分析研究了学校干预对发育性协调障碍（DCD）儿童和青少年运动表现的影响，并发现了积极结果。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis confirms the positive impact of school-based motor skill interventions on motor performance in children and adolescents with Developmental Coordination Disorder (DCD). This means you should actively support and promote motor interventions within schools, as they are a vital pathway to improving functional outcomes for individuals with DCD.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Sensorimotor recovery and neuropathic pain reduction after remotely delivered cognitive multisensory rehabilitation or remotely delivered exercise in adults with spinal cord injury: a pilot clinical trial.
items.summary: A pilot clinical trial explored whether remotely delivered cognitive multisensory rehabilitation or remotely delivered exercise could improve sensorimotor recovery and reduce neuropathic pain in adults with spinal cord injury.
items.curatedReason: 这项试点临床试验表明，远程认知多感官康复或远程运动疗法能改善脊髓损伤（SCI）患者的躯体感觉恢复和神经病理性疼痛。这为你远程干预 SCI 患者提供了新的证据，尤其是在处理神经病理性疼痛和身体表征障碍时，可以考虑整合这类疗法。
items.titleZh: 脊髓损伤成人远程认知多感官康复或远程运动疗法后的躯体感觉恢复和神经病理性疼痛减轻：一项试点临床试验
items.summaryZh: 一项试点临床试验探讨了远程认知多感官康复或远程运动疗法是否能改善脊髓损伤成人患者的躯体感觉恢复并减轻神经病理性疼痛。
items.curatedReasonEn: This pilot clinical trial suggests that remotely delivered cognitive multisensory rehabilitation or exercise can improve sensorimotor recovery and reduce neuropathic pain in individuals with spinal cord injury (SCI). This provides new evidence for your remote interventions for SCI patients, particularly in addressing neuropathic pain and body representation deficits, making these therapies worth considering.

items.title: Warm-up is not a workout: a principles-based critique of continued efforts to use warm-up programmes for ACL injury prevention
items.summary: A critique argues against the continued efforts to use warm-up programs for ACL injury prevention, emphasizing the distinction between warm-up and workout in terms of efficacy versus effectiveness.
items.curatedReason: 这篇文章明确指出热身并非训练，并对将热身计划用于 ACL 损伤预防的持续努力提出了批判。你应区分热身与训练的目的，并认识到虽然热身有益，但不能替代全面的损伤预防训练计划。
items.titleZh: 热身并非训练：对持续将热身计划用于 ACL 损伤预防的原则性批判
items.summaryZh: 一篇评论文章批判了将热身计划持续用于 ACL（前交叉韧带）损伤预防的做法，强调了热身与训练在功效和效果之间存在区别。
items.curatedReasonEn: This article explicitly states that warm-up is not a workout and critiques ongoing efforts to use warm-up programs for ACL injury prevention. You should distinguish the purpose of warm-up from training and recognize that while warm-ups are beneficial, they are not a substitute for comprehensive injury prevention training programs.

items.title: PhysiCase: Development and dual-layer validation of synthetic cases for health professional education: A pilot study leveraging Generative AI
items.summary: The PhysiCase project developed and dual-layer validated synthetic cases for health professional education using Generative AI, addressing privacy and ethical barriers associated with real-world clinical records.
items.curatedReason: PhysiCase 项目利用生成式 AI 开发和验证合成病例，这在健康专业教育中具有重要意义。这意味着 AI 生成的临床病例有望克服真实病例的隐私和伦理障碍，为你提供高质量的训练材料，并推动 AI 在教育中的应用。
items.titleZh: PhysiCase：利用生成式 AI 开发和双层验证用于健康专业教育的合成病例：一项试点研究
items.summaryZh: PhysiCase 项目利用生成式 AI 开发并双层验证了用于健康专业教育的合成病例，解决了真实临床记录相关的隐私和伦理障碍。
items.curatedReasonEn: The PhysiCase project, utilizing generative AI for developing and validating synthetic cases, holds significant importance in health professional education. This means AI-generated clinical cases could overcome privacy and ethical barriers of real cases, providing you with high-quality training materials and advancing AI application in education.

items.title: Thriving in Motion: a community-based therapeutic physical literacy programme for children experiencing barriers to being active
items.summary: “Thriving in Motion” is a community-based therapeutic physical literacy program designed to engage children experiencing medical, behavioral, and/or social barriers to regular physical activity.
items.curatedReason: “Thriving in Motion”项目为那些面临活动障碍的儿童提供了一个社区导向的治疗性体育素养计划。你可以借鉴其模式，为有医疗、行为或社会挑战的儿童提供量身定制的运动服务，提高他们的身体活动水平和整体健康。
items.titleZh: “Thriving in Motion”：一项为面临活动障碍儿童设计的社区治疗性体育素养计划
items.summaryZh: “Thriving in Motion”是一个社区导向的治疗性体育素养项目，旨在帮助那些因医疗、行为或社会原因而难以参与常规体育活动的儿童。
items.curatedReasonEn: The "Thriving in Motion" program offers a community-based therapeutic physical literacy program for children facing barriers to being active. You can learn from its model to provide tailored exercise services for children with medical, behavioral, and/or social challenges, improving their physical activity levels and overall well-being.

items.title: Reducing Recidivism After Traumatic Brain Injury: Results from the Reentry Continuum for Brain Injury (RCBI) Trial
items.summary: The Reentry Continuum for Brain Injury (RCBI) trial examined an intervention for individuals with TBI pending prison release, aiming to reduce recidivism and improve behavioral infractions, self-efficacy, and aggression.
items.curatedReason: RCBI 试验的结果表明，针对创伤性脑损伤（TBI）出狱人员的干预措施在减少再犯罪方面可能有效。你需要考虑在 TBI 患者的康复计划中纳入旨在改善自我效能和行为的综合干预，尤其对于涉及司法系统的人群。
items.titleZh: 降低创伤性脑损伤后的再犯罪率：脑损伤再入连续体（RCBI）试验结果
items.summaryZh: 脑损伤再入连续体（RCBI）试验评估了一项针对即将出狱的创伤性脑损伤（TBI）患者的干预措施，旨在降低再犯罪率并改善行为违规、自我效能和攻击性。
items.curatedReasonEn: Results from the RCBI trial suggest that interventions for individuals with traumatic brain injury (TBI) pending release from prison may be effective in reducing recidivism. You should consider incorporating comprehensive interventions aimed at improving self-efficacy and behavior into rehabilitation plans for TBI patients, especially those involved with the justice system.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Advancing the management of patellar tendinopathy (PhD Academy Award)
items.summary: A PhD study focused on improving patellar tendinopathy management through patient education and understanding of treatment response, evaluating AI chatbot reliability and long-term prognosis of exercise therapy.
items.curatedReason: 这项博士研究旨在通过改进患者教育和理解治疗反应来提升髌骨肌腱病的管理。你应该关注 AI 聊天机器人在提供健康信息方面的可靠性，以及运动疗法对髌骨肌腱病的长期预后数据，以优化你的临床实践。
items.titleZh: 髌骨肌腱病管理的进展（博士学院奖）
items.summaryZh: 一项博士研究旨在通过改进患者教育和对治疗反应的理解来提升髌骨肌腱病管理，同时评估了 AI 聊天机器人的可靠性以及运动疗法在长期预后中的作用。
items.curatedReasonEn: This PhD research aims to advance patellar tendinopathy management by improving patient education and understanding of treatment response. You should pay attention to the reliability of AI chatbots for health information and long-term prognosis data for exercise therapy in patellar tendinopathy to optimize your clinical practice.

items.title: Development of an Open-Access Action Observation Video Library for Upper Limb Motor Rehabilitation
items.summary: This study describes the development of an open-access action observation (AO) video library to support upper limb motor rehabilitation for stroke survivors, addressing the current limitation of available AO videos.
items.curatedReason: 开发开放获取的动作观察视频库对上肢运动康复具有重要意义。这个库能帮助你更便捷地将动作观察疗法应用于中风患者，解决目前资源有限的痛点。
items.titleZh: 上肢运动康复开放获取动作观察视频库的开发
items.summaryZh: 这项研究描述了开放获取的动作观察（AO）视频库的开发，旨在支持中风幸存者的上肢运动康复，解决目前 AO 视频资源有限的问题。
items.curatedReasonEn: The development of an open-access action observation video library is significant for upper limb motor rehabilitation. This library will help you apply action observation therapy more conveniently to stroke survivors, addressing the current pain point of limited resources.

items.title: Cardiac care of athletes with disabilities: are we prepared to adapt?
items.summary: This commentary highlights the increasing participation of athletes with disabilities in sports and the existing gap in research regarding their cardiac care, urging adaptation in policies and practices.
items.curatedReason: 随着残疾运动员参与运动的频率和强度增加，你需要了解他们独特的 cardíaco 护理需求。目前对残疾运动员心脏特征的研究不足，这将限制你提供循证的、适应性的运动指导和心血管筛查。
items.titleZh: 残疾运动员的心脏护理：我们准备好适应了吗？
items.summaryZh: 这篇评论强调了残疾运动员在体育运动中参与度的增加，以及在他们心脏护理方面现有研究的不足，敦促政策和实践进行调整。
items.curatedReasonEn: As athletes with disabilities participate in sports more frequently and intensely, you need to understand their unique cardiac care needs. The current lack of research on cardiac characteristics in athletes with disabilities will limit your ability to provide evidence-based, adaptive sports guidance and cardiovascular screening.

items.title: Characteristics and reasons for non-attendance at exercise therapy and self-management support among patients with multimorbidity. An exploratory cross-sectional study from the MOBILIZE trial
items.summary: An exploratory cross-sectional study investigated characteristics and reasons for non-attendance at exercise therapy and self-management support among patients with multimorbidity in the MOBILIZE trial.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究揭示了多重共病患者不参加运动治疗和自我管理支持的特点及原因。你需要了解这些障碍，以便设计更具包容性和吸引力的干预措施，提高这类复杂患者的依从性。
items.titleZh: 多重共病患者不参加运动治疗和自我管理支持的特点及原因：MOBILIZE 试验的一项探索性横断面研究
items.summaryZh: 一项探索性横断面研究调查了 MOBILIZE 试验中多重共病患者不参加运动治疗和自我管理支持的特点和原因。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study sheds light on the characteristics and reasons for non-attendance at exercise therapy and self-management support among patients with multimorbidity. You need to understand these barriers to design more inclusive and engaging interventions that improve adherence in this complex patient population.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Cortical activity during narrative discourse production in individuals with post-stroke aphasia and controls measured via functional near-infrared spectroscopy
items.summary: This study used functional near-infrared spectroscopy (fNIRS) to measure cortical activity during narrative discourse production in individuals with post-stroke aphasia and controls, providing insights into language impairment.
items.curatedReason: 这项 fNIRS 研究提供了中风后失语症患者叙事话语皮层活动的新见解。虽然它不直接改变你的临床干预，但有助于深化对失语症神经机制的理解，可能会为未来的康复策略提供理论基础。
items.titleZh: 中风后失语症患者与对照组叙事话语产生过程中的皮层活动，通过功能性近红外光谱测量
items.summaryZh: 这项研究利用功能性近红外光谱（fNIRS）测量了中风后失语症患者和对照组在叙事话语产生过程中的皮层活动，从而深入了解语言障碍。
items.curatedReasonEn: This fNIRS study provides new insights into cortical activity during narrative discourse production in individuals with post-stroke aphasia. While it doesn't directly alter your clinical interventions, it contributes to a deeper understanding of the neural mechanisms of aphasia, potentially informing future rehabilitation strategies.

items.title: Preventative strategies for non-contact lower limb injuries among male football players: A scoping review.
items.summary: This scoping review maps the range of preventative strategies used to reduce non-contact lower limb injuries among male footballers, identifying a variety of approaches to address this common issue.
items.curatedReason: 这份范围综述概述了预防男性足球运动员非接触性下肢损伤的策略。如果你从事运动康复，应关注综述中提及的各种预防方法，并在实践中考虑其证据强度和适用性。
items.titleZh: 男性足球运动员非接触性下肢损伤的预防策略：一项范围综述
items.summaryZh: 这项范围综述概述了用于减少男性足球运动员非接触性下肢损伤的预防策略，识别出应对这一常见问题的多种方法。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review outlines strategies for preventing non-contact lower limb injuries in male football players. If you are involved in sports rehabilitation, you should pay attention to the various preventive methods mentioned in the review and consider their evidence strength and applicability in practice.
items.journal: The South African journal of physiotherapy

items.title: Long-term resistance training with all-cause and cause-specific mortality: assessing dose-response and joint associations with aerobic physical activity
items.summary: A large prospective cohort study involving three cohorts (Health Professionals Follow-up Study, Nurses’ Health Study, Nurses’ Health Study II) found that resistance training is associated with lower all-cause and cause-specific mortality, demonstrating a dose-response relationship and joint benefits with aerobic activity.
items.curatedReason: 长期抗阻训练与全因和特定原因死亡率的关系，这项大型前瞻性队列研究给出了明确证据：抗阻训练不仅降低全因死亡率，还能降低特定疾病死亡率，并且与有氧运动结合效果更佳。这是你向患者推广运动处方时最有力的证据之一，务必在日常工作中强调抗阻训练的重要性。
items.titleZh: 长期抗阻训练与全因及特定原因死亡率：剂量反应和与有氧体力活动的联合关联评估
items.summaryZh: 一项涵盖三个大型前瞻性队列（健康专业人员随访研究、护士健康研究、护士健康研究II）的研究发现，抗阻训练与较低的全因及特定原因死亡率相关，并显示出剂量反应关系以及与有氧活动的联合益处。
items.curatedReasonEn: This large prospective cohort study provides clear evidence on the relationship between long-term resistance training and all-cause and cause-specific mortality: resistance training not only lowers all-cause mortality but also reduces mortality from specific diseases, with even better results when combined with aerobic exercise. This is one of the strongest pieces of evidence you have when advocating for exercise prescriptions to patients; be sure to emphasize the importance of resistance training in your daily practice.

items.title: Early versus conventional postoperative rehabilitation after reverse total shoulder arthroplasty: a systematic review of functional outcomes and complications.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis comparing early (≤14 days) vs. delayed (≥28 days) rehabilitation after reverse total shoulder arthroplasty (rTSA) found no significant difference in functional outcomes, but early rehabilitation may increase complications.
items.curatedReason: rTSA 术后康复的时机需要再评估。这项系统综述指出早期（<14 天）和常规（>28 天）康复在功能结局上没有显著差异，但早期康复并发症可能更高。这不是让你彻底放弃早期康复，而是提示你对每个患者个体化考虑，权衡早期活动带来的潜在风险。
items.titleZh: 反向全肩关节置换术后早期与常规康复在功能结局和并发症方面的系统综述
items.summaryZh: 一项比较反向全肩关节置换术后早期（≤14天）与常规（≥28天）康复的系统综述及Meta分析发现，两组在功能结局上无显著差异，但早期康复可能增加并发症。
items.curatedReasonEn: The timing of rehabilitation after rTSA needs re-evaluation. This systematic review indicates no significant functional differences between early (<14 days) and conventional (>28 days) rehabilitation, but early rehabilitation might be associated with higher complications. This isn't a call to abandon early rehab, but a prompt to individualize patient care and weigh the potential risks of early mobilization.

items.title: Wearable Myoelectric Interface for Neurorehabilitation (MINT) to Recover Arm Activity After Stroke: A Randomized Controlled Trial.
items.summary: A single-blind, randomized, sham-controlled trial found that the home-based Myoelectric Interface for Neurorehabilitation (MINT) significantly reduced abnormal muscle co-activation and improved arm activity in moderately-to-severely impaired chronic stroke survivors.
items.curatedReason: 卒中后上肢功能康复的一个新方向：基于可穿戴肌电界面的家庭康复（MINT）。这项 RCT 显示 MINT 能有效减少异常肌肉协同激活，改善慢性卒中患者的上肢活动。这对于那些在诊所康复受限的患者，提供了一个有前景的家庭干预方案。
items.titleZh: 可穿戴肌电神经康复界面（MINT）在卒中后上肢活动恢复中的应用：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项单盲、随机、假对照试验发现，居家可穿戴肌电神经康复界面（MINT）显著减少了中重度慢性卒中患者的异常肌肉协同激活并改善了上肢活动。
items.curatedReasonEn: A new direction for upper limb rehabilitation after stroke: home-based rehabilitation with wearable myoelectric interface (MINT). This RCT shows that MINT effectively reduces abnormal muscle co-activation and improves upper limb activity in chronic stroke survivors. This offers a promising home intervention option for patients with limited access to clinic-based rehabilitation.

items.title: Sit-to-stand test emerges as a powerful prognostic factor of future health outcomes: different versions, measurement properties and future perspectives
items.summary: A commentary emphasizes the sit-to-stand test as a powerful prognostic factor for future health outcomes, correlating muscular strength with long-term health conditions and advocating for its increased use in assessment.
items.curatedReason: “坐站测试”（Sit-to-stand test）作为未来健康结局的有力预后因素，这篇述评强调了其价值。你应该认识到这个看似简单的测试背后有强大的循证支持，它能有效地预测多种长期健康状况。在日常评估中，可以更重视它的应用，并据此调整干预策略。
items.titleZh: 坐站测试成为未来健康结局的有力预后因素：不同版本、测量属性及未来展望
items.summaryZh: 一篇述评强调了坐站测试作为未来健康结局有力预后因素的价值，它将肌肉力量与长期健康状况相关联，并倡导在评估中更广泛地使用该测试。
items.curatedReasonEn: This commentary highlights the value of the Sit-to-Stand test as a powerful prognostic factor for future health outcomes. You should recognize that this seemingly simple test has strong evidence backing its ability to predict multiple long-term health conditions. Integrate it more effectively into your routine assessments and adjust intervention strategies accordingly.

items.title: Randomised three-armed trial investigation of the Copenhagen Achilles tendon Rupture Treatment Algorithm (CARTA) for individualised treatment of acute Achilles tendon rupture
items.summary: A multicenter, three-arm, randomized controlled trial evaluated the Copenhagen Achilles Tendon Rupture Treatment Algorithm (CARTA) for individualized treatment of acute Achilles tendon rupture, comparing it against default operative and non-operative strategies.
items.curatedReason: 跟腱急性断裂的个体化治疗，CARTA 算法（哥本哈根跟腱断裂治疗算法）的 RCT 结果出来了。它旨在提供比默认手术或非手术治疗更优的个性化方案。如果你在跟腱断裂的治疗决策中，应该关注这一进展，这可能会改变你评估和推荐治疗路径的方式。
items.titleZh: 哥本哈根跟腱断裂治疗算法（CARTA）个体化治疗急性跟腱断裂的随机三臂试验研究
items.summaryZh: 一项多中心、三臂、随机对照试验评估了哥本哈根跟腱断裂治疗算法（CARTA）在急性跟腱断裂个体化治疗中的应用，并与默认手术及非手术治疗策略进行比较。
items.curatedReasonEn: The RCT results for the Copenhagen Achilles Tendon Rupture Treatment Algorithm (CARTA) are out, aiming to provide individualized treatment superior to default operative or non-operative strategies for acute Achilles tendon rupture. If you are involved in treatment decisions for Achilles tendon ruptures, you should pay attention to this development, as it might change how you assess and recommend treatment pathways.

items.title: Exercise interventions for rotator cuff-related shoulder pain in middle-aged and older adults: a systematic review and meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis demonstrated the effectiveness of exercise-based interventions in reducing pain, improving function, range of motion, and strength in middle-aged and older adults with rotator cuff-related shoulder pain.
items.curatedReason: 中老年肩袖相关性肩痛的运动干预，这次系统综述和 Meta 分析给出了运动在疼痛缓解、功能改善和力量提升上的明确证据。这夯实了运动疗法作为非手术治疗一线选择的地位，是跟患者和医生沟通时的重要论据。
items.titleZh: 中老年肩袖相关性肩痛的运动干预：系统综述与Meta分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和Meta分析表明，以运动为基础的干预措施能有效减轻中老年肩袖相关性肩痛患者的疼痛，改善功能、活动范围和力量。
items.curatedReasonEn: For rotator cuff-related shoulder pain in middle-aged and older adults, this systematic review and meta-analysis provides clear evidence for exercise interventions in pain relief, functional improvement, and strength gains. This reinforces the role of exercise therapy as a first-line non-surgical option and is a crucial point when communicating with patients and other clinicians.

items.title: Diagnostic and prognostic accuracy of Berg Balance Scale and Mini-Balance Evaluation Systems Test in individuals with stroke: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis investigated the diagnostic and prognostic accuracy of the Berg Balance Scale (BBS) and Mini-Balance Evaluation Systems Test (Mini-BESTest) in individuals with stroke, clarifying their cutoff values and utility.
items.curatedReason: 脑卒中患者平衡评估的常用工具 BBS 和 Mini-BESTest，这篇系统综述和 Meta 分析明确了它们的诊断和预后准确性。当你需要评估脑卒中患者的跌倒风险或预测功能恢复时，现在对这两种量表的阈值和应用场景有了更清晰的证据，可以更自信地选择和解读。
items.titleZh: Berg平衡量表和Mini-BESTest在脑卒中患者中的诊断与预后准确性：系统综述和Meta分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和Meta分析研究了Berg平衡量表（BBS）和Mini-BESTest在脑卒中患者中的诊断与预后准确性，阐明了它们的截断值和效用。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis clarifies the diagnostic and prognostic accuracy of BBS and Mini-BESTest, common balance assessment tools for stroke patients. When you need to assess fall risk or predict functional recovery in stroke patients, you now have clearer evidence on the thresholds and application scenarios for these scales, allowing for more confident selection and interpretation.

items.title: Multimodal symptom-targeted treatment for young people with persisting post-concussion symptoms: a randomised clinical trial
items.summary: A single-site, open-label, assessor-blinded, parallel-group randomized clinical trial evaluated the effectiveness of "Concussion Essentials" (CE), a symptom-targeted, multidisciplinary treatment for persisting post-concussion symptoms (PPCS) in 8–18-year-olds.
items.curatedReason: 青少年持续性脑震荡后症状的多模式治疗，一项 RCT 评估了“脑震荡要点”（Concussion Essentials, CE）方案的有效性。这项研究为青少年 PPCS 提供了一个有前景的结构化、多学科干预模型。如果你手头有这类患者，这为你提供了更多证据支持的治疗选择。
items.titleZh: 针对青少年持续性脑震荡后症状的多模式对症治疗：一项随机临床试验
items.summaryZh: 一项单中心、开放标签、评估者盲法、平行组随机临床试验评估了“脑震荡要点”（Concussion Essentials, CE）的有效性，该方案是针对8-18岁青少年持续性脑震荡后症状（PPCS）的多学科对症治疗。
items.curatedReasonEn: An RCT evaluated the effectiveness of the "Concussion Essentials" (CE) program for multimodal symptom-targeted treatment for young people with persisting post-concussion symptoms (PPCS). This study offers a promising structured, multidisciplinary intervention model for adolescent PPCS. If you have such patients, this provides you with more evidence-supported treatment options.

items.title: Community-Based Resistance Intensive Personal Training (RIPT) Program for Youth with Cerebral Palsy: A Prospective Cohort Pilot Study.
items.summary: A prospective cohort pilot study demonstrated that a community-based, goal-focused, 12-week resistance intensive personal training (RIPT) program improved goal performance, gross motor function, and anaerobic capacity in youth with cerebral palsy.
items.curatedReason: 社区力量训练对脑瘫儿童的益处，这项前瞻性队列研究证实了其在目标达成、粗大运动功能（步速、步行能力）和厌氧能力上的改善。这表明在常规治疗之外，社区为基础的强化训练能有效提升脑瘫儿童的功能独立性。
items.titleZh: 社区力量强化个人训练（RIPT）项目对脑瘫青少年的影响：一项前瞻性队列试点研究
items.summaryZh: 一项前瞻性队列试点研究表明，为期12周的社区化、目标导向的力量强化个人训练（RIPT）项目改善了脑瘫青少年的目标表现、粗大运动功能和厌氧能力。
items.curatedReasonEn: This prospective cohort study confirms the benefits of community-based resistance training for children with cerebral palsy, showing improvements in goal attainment, gross motor function (gait speed, walking capacity), and anaerobic capacity. This suggests that community-based intensive training, beyond conventional therapy, can effectively enhance functional independence in children with CP.

items.title: Ischemic preconditioning alters gait mechanics in older adults with knee osteoarthritis.
items.summary: A study found that a single session of ischemic preconditioning altered gait mechanics in older adults with knee osteoarthritis, suggesting a potential novel intervention for this population.
items.curatedReason: 针对膝骨关节炎老年患者，单次缺血预处理（IPC）能改变步态力学。这虽然只是一个初步发现，但它提示 IPC 可能是一种非运动干预的辅助手段，值得你关注后续的临床疗效研究，看它是否能转化为实用的辅助治疗。
items.titleZh: 缺血预处理改变膝骨关节炎老年患者的步态力学
items.summaryZh: 一项研究发现，单次缺血预处理改变了膝骨关节炎老年患者的步态力学，提示其可能成为针对该人群的新型干预措施。
items.curatedReasonEn: For older adults with knee osteoarthritis, a single session of ischemic preconditioning (IPC) can alter gait mechanics. While a preliminary finding, this suggests IPC might be an adjunctive non-exercise intervention. You should watch for future clinical efficacy studies to see if it translates into practical adjunctive therapy.

items.title: Long-term risk of knee replacement after ACL reconstruction using the contralateral knee as an internal control: a National Hospital Episode Statistics database study of 135 881 patients
items.summary: A large population-based study (N=135,881) using national hospital data found that patients who underwent ACL reconstruction had a 4.9 times higher long-term risk of knee arthroplasty compared to their contralateral knee.
items.curatedReason: 这项基于英国国家医院数据库（N=135,881）的大规模研究显示，ACL 重建术后膝关节置换的长期风险显著增加。与对侧膝关节相比，ACLr 后的膝关节置换风险高出4.9倍。这意味着你必须对 ACLr 患者进行持续性教育，并早期干预，以延缓骨关节炎进展，降低远期置换需求。
items.titleZh: 以对侧膝关节作为内部对照评估 ACL 重建术后膝关节置换的长期风险：一项对135,881名患者进行的国家医院发病率统计数据库研究
items.summaryZh: 一项基于国家医院发病率统计数据库对135,881名患者进行的大规模人群研究发现，接受 ACL 重建术的患者，与对侧膝关节相比，长期膝关节置换的风险高出4.9倍。
items.curatedReasonEn: This large-scale study (N=135,881) based on the UK National Hospital Episode Statistics database shows a significantly increased long-term risk of knee replacement after ACL reconstruction. The risk of knee replacement after ACLr is 4.9 times higher compared to the contralateral knee. This means you must provide continuous education and early intervention for ACLr patients to slow the progression of osteoarthritis and reduce the long-term need for replacement.

items.title: Smartphone-Based Semi-Immersive Virtual Reality Enhances Upper Extremity Function in Subacute Stroke: A Randomized Controlled Trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial (N=40) demonstrated that smartphone-based semi-immersive virtual reality augmented conventional physical therapy significantly enhanced upper extremity function in individuals with subacute stroke.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT (N=40) 发现，在亚急性卒中患者中，将基于智能手机的半沉浸式虚拟现实（VR）与常规物理治疗结合，比单独常规物理治疗更能显著改善上肢功能。这提示你 VR 可能是低成本、有效的辅助手段，可考虑在临床中试用，尤其是当患者对传统康复出现平台期时。
items.titleZh: 基于智能手机的半沉浸式虚拟现实在亚急性卒中患者中增强上肢功能：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验（N=40）表明，基于智能手机的半沉浸式虚拟现实辅助常规物理治疗显著增强了亚急性卒中患者的上肢功能。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT (N=40) found that combining smartphone-based semi-immersive virtual reality (VR) with conventional physical therapy significantly improved upper extremity function more than conventional therapy alone in subacute stroke patients. This suggests VR could be a low-cost, effective adjunctive tool. Consider piloting its use in clinical practice, especially when patients reach a plateau with traditional rehabilitation.

items.title: THE COMPARATIVE EFFECTIVENESS OF INPATIENT VERSUS SKILLED NURSING FACILITY REHABILITATION USING LINKED ACUTE STROKE REGISTRY DATA.
items.summary: A retrospective comparative effectiveness cohort study examined rehabilitation outcomes in inpatient rehabilitation facilities versus skilled nursing facilities for acute stroke patients, using linked registry data to assess 'home time' as a proxy for functional recovery.
items.curatedReason: 这项回顾性研究（N=未知）对比了住院康复机构（IRFs）与专业护理机构（SNFs）对急性卒中患者功能恢复的有效性。在报销和转诊决策中，了解不同机构的实际效果至关重要。这可能为你与患者及其家属提供基于证据的建议，选择最适合的康复环境。
items.titleZh: 住院与专业护理机构康复的比较效果：基于关联急性卒中登记数据的回顾性观察研究
items.summaryZh: 一项回顾性比较效果队列研究，利用关联的急性卒中登记数据，评估了住院康复机构与专业护理机构对急性卒中患者的康复效果，以“在家时间”作为功能恢复的替代指标。
items.curatedReasonEn: This retrospective study (N=unknown) compares the effectiveness of inpatient rehabilitation facilities (IRFs) versus skilled nursing facilities (SNFs) on functional recovery in acute stroke patients. Understanding the real-world outcomes of different settings is crucial for reimbursement and referral decisions. This could help you provide evidence-based recommendations to patients and their families in choosing the most suitable rehabilitation environment.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

items.title: Are There Sex Disparities in Return to Sport After Anterior Cruciate Ligament Reconstruction? A Systematic Review and Exploratory Meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and exploratory meta-analysis investigated sex disparities in return-to-sport (RTS) outcomes after anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction (ACLR), noting that female athletes may have higher ACL injury rates but lower RTS rates.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和 Meta 分析（纳入研究未知）揭示了 ACL 重建术后重返运动（RTS）存在性别差异。女性运动员在 ACL 损伤率更高，但 RTS 率却可能低于男性。你在康复计划中需考虑到这些性别特异性因素，并为女性运动员提供更个性化、支持性的方案，以优化她们的 RTS 机会。
items.titleZh: 前交叉韧带重建术后重返运动是否存在性别差异？一项系统综述和探索性 Meta 分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和探索性 Meta 分析调查了前交叉韧带重建术后重返运动（RTS）结局中的性别差异，指出女性运动员的 ACL 损伤率可能更高，但 RTS 率可能更低。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis (number of included studies unknown) reveals sex disparities in return-to-sport (RTS) after ACL reconstruction. Female athletes have higher ACL injury rates but may exhibit lower RTS rates than males. You need to consider these sex-specific factors in rehabilitation plans and provide more personalized, supportive programs for female athletes to optimize their RTS opportunities.
items.journal: The American journal of sports medicine

items.title: Effectiveness of maintenance interventions promoting physical activity following exercise therapy for chronic conditions: an umbrella review
items.summary: An umbrella review investigated the effectiveness of maintenance interventions following exercise therapy for chronic conditions on physical activity, function, fitness, and quality of life, using a narrative synthesis.
items.curatedReason: 这项伞形综述评估了慢性病患者运动治疗后的维持性干预措施对身体活动的有效性。它强调了维持干预的重要性，但同时也发现证据质量不一。这意味着你在制定长期康复计划时，应积极融入维持策略，但需根据具体慢性病的指南，选择证据级别最高的干预措施。
items.titleZh: 运动治疗后促进身体活动的维持性干预措施对慢性病患者的有效性：一项伞形综述
items.summaryZh: 一项伞形综述采用叙述性综合分析，调查了慢性病患者在运动治疗后，维持性干预措施对身体活动、功能、体能和生活质量的有效性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This umbrella review assessed the effectiveness of maintenance interventions promoting physical activity after exercise therapy for chronic conditions. It underscores the importance of maintenance interventions but also noted varied evidence quality. This means you should actively integrate maintenance strategies into long-term rehabilitation plans, but choose interventions with the highest level of evidence based on specific chronic disease guidelines.

items.title: The impact of a brief online education intervention on the knowledge, attitudes and beliefs of qualified physiotherapists about chronic low back pain: Pre- and post-intervention survey.
items.summary: A pre- and post-intervention survey (N=74) found that a brief online education program improved physiotherapists' knowledge, attitudes, and beliefs regarding chronic low back pain, supporting biopsychosocial approaches.
items.curatedReason: 在线教育干预对物理治疗师慢性腰痛知识、态度和信念的影响尚可。该研究样本量小（N=74），且无对照组，结果的临床转化需谨慎。但如果你正在考虑类似方案来提升临床团队对生物心理社会模式的依从性，这提供了一个初步的思路。
items.titleZh: 简短在线教育干预对物理治疗师慢性腰痛知识、态度和信念影响：干预前后调查
items.summaryZh: 一项对74名物理治疗师进行的干预前后调查显示，一项简短的在线教育项目改善了他们对慢性腰痛的知识、态度和信念，支持采用生物心理社会方法。
items.curatedReasonEn: The impact of online education on physiotherapists' knowledge, attitudes, and beliefs about chronic low back pain is moderate. This study had a small sample size (N=74) and no control group, so clinical translation of the results should be approached with caution. However, if you're considering similar interventions to enhance your team's adherence to the biopsychosocial model, this offers an initial perspective.
items.journal: The South African journal of physiotherapy

items.title: Effectiveness of passive vs. assistive robotic gait training on functional recovery and neuroplasticity post-stroke: A randomized controlled trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial (N=48) compared passive versus assistive robotic gait training in subacute stroke patients, investigating their impacts on lower limb motor function recovery and neural mechanisms.
items.curatedReason: 被动与辅助式机器人步态训练对卒中后功能恢复和神经可塑性的影响，这项 RCT (N=48) 旨在探讨不同模式的效果。这有助于你理解机器人辅助康复的潜在机制，尤其是在为亚急性卒中患者选择步态训练策略时。但需留意神经可塑性测量的具体方法和临床相关性。
items.titleZh: 被动与辅助式机器人步态训练对卒中后功能恢复和神经可塑性的有效性：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验（N=48）比较了亚急性卒中患者被动与辅助式机器人步态训练的效果，旨在探讨其对下肢运动功能恢复和神经机制的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT (N=48) explores the effects of passive versus assistive robotic gait training on functional recovery and neuroplasticity post-stroke. This helps you understand the potential mechanisms of robot-assisted rehabilitation, particularly when choosing gait training strategies for subacute stroke patients. However, pay attention to the specific methods of neuroplasticity measurement and their clinical relevance.

items.title: Functional stratification reveals speed-independent gait impairments beyond chronological age.
items.summary: This study found that functionally stratifying older adults using the Short Physical Performance Battery revealed speed-independent gait impairments beyond chronological age, indicating early functional decline.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究强调了功能性分层在识别老年人步态障碍方面的重要性，而非仅仅依赖年龄。这意味着你在评估老年患者时，应采用更精细的功能性工具（如 SPPB）来早期发现步态问题，即使他们看起来“年轻”，这可能揭示出速度之外的早期损伤。
items.titleZh: 功能性分层揭示了超越年龄的独立于速度的步态障碍
items.summaryZh: 这项研究发现，使用简短身体表现电池（SPPB）对老年人进行功能性分层，揭示了超越年龄的独立于速度的步态障碍，表明了早期的功能衰退。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study underscores the importance of functional stratification in identifying gait impairments in older adults, rather than relying solely on chronological age. This means you should use more refined functional tools (like SPPB) in assessing older patients to detect early gait problems, even if they appear 'young,' which could reveal early impairments beyond speed.

items.title: Comparative effectiveness of supervised individual, group-based, and mixed physiotherapy approaches on pain and function in patients with chronic pain in primary care: a retrospective observational study.
items.summary: A retrospective observational study (N=220) compared individual, group-based, and mixed physiotherapy for chronic pain, finding similar improvements in pain and function across all three approaches in primary care.
items.curatedReason: 对慢性疼痛患者，个体、团体或混合物理治疗的效果对比仍不明确。这项回顾性观察研究（N=220）发现，在疼痛和功能改善方面，这三种模式的临床效果相似。这意味着在资源有限时，团体治疗可能是个经济有效的替代方案，但需注意研究的局限性。
items.titleZh: 初级保健慢性疼痛患者中个体、团体和混合物理治疗对疼痛和功能的比较效果：回顾性观察研究
items.summaryZh: 一项回顾性观察研究（N=220）比较了初级保健中个体、团体和混合物理治疗对慢性疼痛患者的疗效，发现三种方法在疼痛和功能改善方面效果相似。
items.curatedReasonEn: The comparative effectiveness of individual, group-based, and mixed physiotherapy for chronic pain remains unclear. This retrospective observational study (N=220) found similar clinical outcomes in pain and function across all three modalities. This suggests group therapy could be a cost-effective alternative when resources are limited, but be mindful of the study's limitations.

items.title: How do people with multiple sclerosis who have walking difficulties perceive participation? A qualitative analysis.
items.summary: A qualitative study explored the perceived participation of people with multiple sclerosis who have walking difficulties, highlighting that while the ICF framework is useful, it lacks the subjective perception of participation.
items.curatedReason: 多发性硬化症患者的参与感是康复的关键，但这篇定性研究强调，ICF 框架仍需补充患者的主观视角。这意味着在评估和干预时，你不仅要关注 ICF 的客观指标，更要主动探寻患者对其自身参与的理解和期望，以实现真正以患者为中心的康复目标。
items.titleZh: 有步行困难的多发性硬化症患者如何看待参与？一项定性分析
items.summaryZh: 一项定性研究探讨了有步行困难的多发性硬化症患者对参与的看法，强调国际功能、残疾和健康分类（ICF）框架虽有用，但缺乏对参与的主观感知。
items.curatedReasonEn: Patient participation is key in MS rehabilitation, but this qualitative study highlights that the ICF framework needs to be supplemented with the patient's subjective perspective. This means you should not only focus on objective ICF metrics during assessment and intervention but also actively explore patients' understanding and expectations of their own participation to achieve truly patient-centered rehabilitation goals.

items.title: Sport-related trauma and motor neurone disease: a scoping review of epidemiology, mechanisms and future directions
items.summary: A scoping review mapped existing epidemiological evidence regarding the relationship between sport-related trauma and Motor Neurone Disease/Amyotrophic Lateral Sclerosis (MND/ALS), identifying potential mechanistic pathways and future research directions.
items.curatedReason: 运动相关创伤与运动神经元疾病（MND/ALS）之间的关系尚不明确。这项范围综述旨在绘制现有流行病学证据，并确定潜在的机制途径。它虽然没有给出明确的临床指导，但为你理解这一复杂问题提供了研究方向，提醒你在高强度体育活动背景下关注神经系统症状。
items.titleZh: 运动相关创伤与运动神经元疾病：流行病学、机制和未来方向的范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述梳理了运动相关创伤与运动神经元疾病/肌萎缩侧索硬化症（MND/ALS）之间关系的现有流行病学证据，识别了潜在的机制途径，并提出了未来的研究方向。
items.curatedReasonEn: The relationship between sport-related trauma and Motor Neurone Disease (MND/ALS) is unclear. This scoping review aims to map existing epidemiological evidence and identify potential mechanistic pathways. While it doesn't provide clear clinical guidance, it offers research directions for understanding this complex issue, reminding you to pay attention to neurological symptoms in the context of high-intensity athletic activities.

items.title: Association Between Postoperative Mini-Balance Evaluation Systems Test Scores and Length of Hospital Stay in Patients with Chronic Subdural Hematoma: A Prospective Cohort Study.
items.summary: This prospective cohort study found an association between postoperative Mini-Balance Evaluation Systems Test (Mini-BESTest) scores and length of hospital stay in patients with chronic subdural hematoma.
items.curatedReason: 这项前瞻性队列研究发现，术后 Mini-BESTest 评分与慢性硬膜下血肿患者的住院时间相关。在评估这类患者时，你应该将 Mini-BESTest 作为预测住院时长和指导早期康复干预的重要工具。
items.titleZh: 慢性硬膜下血肿患者术后 Mini-Balance Evaluation Systems Test 评分与住院时间之间的关联：一项前瞻性队列研究
items.summaryZh: 这项前瞻性队列研究发现，慢性硬膜下血肿患者术后 Mini-Balance Evaluation Systems Test (Mini-BESTest) 评分与住院时间之间存在关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: This prospective cohort study found an association between postoperative Mini-BESTest scores and length of hospital stay in patients with chronic subdural hematoma. When assessing these patients, you should use Mini-BESTest as a crucial tool for predicting hospital length of stay and guiding early rehabilitation interventions.

items.title: Barriers and facilitators to leisure-time physical activity among individuals with spinal cord injury in China: A qualitative study.
items.summary: This qualitative study explored barriers and facilitators to leisure-time physical activity among 20 community-dwelling adults with spinal cord injury in China, using the COM-B model.
items.titleZh: 中国脊髓损伤个体休闲体育活动的障碍和促成因素：一项定性研究
items.summaryZh: 这项定性研究使用 COM-B 模型，探讨了中国20名社区居住的脊髓损伤成年个体休闲体育活动的障碍和促成因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study explores barriers and facilitators to leisure-time physical activity among individuals with spinal cord injury in China. If you practice in China and provide rehabilitation services to SCI patients, these findings can help you better understand the cultural and social context to design more targeted interventions.

items.title: Accelerometry-derived physical activity following Achilles tendon rupture: A prospective cohort study.
items.summary: This prospective cohort study investigated accelerometry-derived physical activity during the first year after Achilles tendon rupture (n=42), exploring its relationship with patient-reported outcomes.
items.curatedReason: 这项前瞻性队列研究追踪了跟腱断裂后一年的加速度计物理活动数据。你现在有了更客观的数据来评估患者的活动水平，并将其与患者报告的结果相关联，这有助于你优化重返运动的指导和设定更实际的恢复目标。
items.titleZh: 跟腱断裂后加速度计测量的身体活动：一项前瞻性队列研究
items.summaryZh: 这项前瞻性队列研究调查了42名跟腱断裂患者在术后第一年的加速度计测量身体活动情况，并探讨了其与患者报告结局的关系。
items.curatedReasonEn: This prospective cohort study tracked accelerometry-derived physical activity data for one year after Achilles tendon rupture. You now have more objective data to assess patient activity levels and correlate them with patient-reported outcomes, which helps you optimize return-to-sport guidance and set more realistic recovery goals.

items.title: Lung Boost Trainer Versus Incentive Spirometer on Pulmonary Function Post COVID Hemiplegic Cerebral Palsy Children; Randomized Controlled Trial.
items.summary: This RCT compared the efficacy of Lung Boost Trainer versus incentive spirometer on pulmonary function in COVID hemiplegic cerebral palsy children, finding the trainer to be superior.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 比较了 Lung Boost Trainer 和激励性肺活量计在脑瘫儿童肺功能改善上的效果。如果你在儿科康复中治疗有肺功能障碍的脑瘫儿童，可以考虑将 Lung Boost Trainer 作为一种潜在的有效干预手段。
items.titleZh: Lung Boost Trainer 与激励性肺活量计对 COVID 偏瘫脑瘫儿童肺功能的影响；一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 这项随机对照试验比较了 Lung Boost Trainer 与激励性肺活量计对 COVID 偏瘫脑瘫儿童肺功能的影响，发现 Lung Boost Trainer 效果更优。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT compared the efficacy of the Lung Boost Trainer versus an incentive spirometer on pulmonary function improvement in children with cerebral palsy. If you treat children with cerebral palsy and pulmonary dysfunction in pediatric rehabilitation, you might consider the Lung Boost Trainer as a potentially effective intervention.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Profiles of Quality of Life Outcomes Observed in Rehabilitation Patients Using Latent Profile Analysis.
items.summary: This cross-sectional study explored patterns of quality-of-life outcomes in a diverse group of rehabilitation patients using latent profile analysis, identifying shared profiles across diagnostic groupings.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究通过潜在剖面分析探索了康复患者生活质量结局的模式。了解不同诊断组患者共享的生活质量体验剖面，能帮助你更精细地定制康复计划，关注到患者的整体福祉。
items.titleZh: 应用潜在剖面分析探索康复患者生活质量结局的模式
items.summaryZh: 这项横断面研究通过潜在剖面分析，探索了各类康复患者生活质量结局的模式，识别了跨诊断组的共享剖面。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study explored patterns of quality-of-life outcomes in rehabilitation patients using latent profile analysis. Understanding shared quality-of-life experience profiles across different diagnostic groups can help you tailor rehabilitation plans more precisely, focusing on patients' overall well-being.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: Profiles of Quality of Life Outcomes Observed in Rehabilitation Patients Using Latent Profile Analysis

items.title: Prevalence of knee pain and factors influencing its risk in ambulatory chronic stroke survivors.
items.summary: This cross-sectional study in 212 ambulatory chronic stroke survivors in Vietnam found gait alterations are associated with knee pain, limiting rehabilitation and reducing quality of life.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究揭示了步行卒中幸存者膝关节疼痛的患病率及影响因素。如果你在康复中遇到卒中患者伴有膝关节疼痛，应该优先评估其步态异常并进行干预，以改善生活质量和康复进程。
items.titleZh: 步行慢性卒中幸存者膝关节疼痛的患病率及影响其风险的因素
items.summaryZh: 这项针对越南212名步行慢性卒中幸存者的横断面研究发现，步态改变与膝关节疼痛相关，限制了康复并降低了生活质量。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study reveals the prevalence of knee pain and influencing factors among ambulatory chronic stroke survivors. If you encounter stroke patients with knee pain during rehabilitation, you should prioritize assessing and intervening on their gait alterations to improve quality of life and rehabilitation progress.

items.title: Healthcare professionals' perception of prevalence and assessment of mental ill-health in stroke patients with and without aphasia - a national survey.
items.summary: This national survey investigates healthcare professionals' perceptions of prevalence and assessment of mental ill-health in Swedish stroke care, highlighting challenges in patients with aphasia.
items.curatedReason: 这项全国调查揭示了医疗专业人员对卒中患者（无论有无失语症）心理健康问题的看法和评估方式。你作为康复团队的一员，需要意识到失语症患者心理健康评估的挑战，并积极寻求跨专业协作，确保这些患者的心理需求得到充分关注。
items.titleZh: 医疗专业人员对卒中患者（无论有无失语症）心理健康患病率和评估的看法：一项全国调查
items.summaryZh: 这项全国调查旨在探讨医疗专业人员对瑞典卒中护理中卒中患者（无论有无失语症）心理健康患病率和评估的看法，并强调了失语症患者所面临的挑战。
items.curatedReasonEn: This national survey reveals healthcare professionals' perceptions and assessment methods for mental ill-health in stroke patients, with and without aphasia. As a member of the rehabilitation team, you need to be aware of the challenges in assessing mental health in aphasic patients and actively seek interprofessional collaboration to ensure these patients' psychological needs are adequately addressed.

items.title: Rehabilitation Protocols Following Patellar Instability Surgery: A Structured Review of Published Recommendations and AI Generated Guidance.
items.summary: This structured review evaluates postoperative rehabilitation protocols for patellar instability surgery and compares published recommendations with guidance generated by selected artificial intelligence platforms.
items.curatedReason: 这篇结构化综述评估了髌骨不稳定手术后的康复方案，并将其与 AI 生成的指南进行比较。虽然 AI 辅助决策工具前景广阔，但你仍应以现有最佳证据为核心，审慎评估 AI 建议，而非盲目采纳。
items.titleZh: 髌骨不稳定手术后的康复方案：已发表建议和 AI 生成指南的结构化综述
items.summaryZh: 这项结构化综述评估了髌骨不稳定手术后的康复方案，并将已发表的建议与选定人工智能平台生成的指南进行了比较。
items.curatedReasonEn: This structured review evaluates rehabilitation protocols after patellar instability surgery and compares them with AI-generated guidance. While AI-assisted decision tools are promising, you should prioritize existing best evidence, critically evaluate AI recommendations, and not adopt them blindly.
